global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with various game icons and text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to unlock rare gear and play with friends.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A simple game icon with a square shape, featuring a light outline and a transparent center, positioned at the top.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: Another square game icon similar to the previous one, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A third square game icon with a light outline, positioned at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A fourth square game icon, located in the center right of the ad, matching the style of the others.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon at the top left, featuring a light outline and a transparent center.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon at the top right, similar in style to the previous one.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located in the center bottom, featuring a light outline.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned in the center, below the main text.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon located below the previous one, maintaining the same design.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon at the top center, featuring a light outline.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned next to the previous one at the top.

elements.label: Game title
elements.description: The text 'NeonArena' in bold, large font at the top of the ad, prominently displayed.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The text 'Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight' in a medium-sized font, centered in the ad.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The text 'Shop now' in a bold, eye-catching font at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and playful, NeonArena, unlock rare gear.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by icons and the main message in the center, with the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NeonArena, Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight, Shop now
